title: Checkout authentication failures after deployment
summary: Users receive repeated 401 responses after the latest checkout deployment.
timeline: 08:10 UTC alert opened for auth error rate spike
08:12 UTC support reports customer login failures

evidence.detail: 401 responses increased from 0.5% to 38% over 5 minutes.
Token validation failed because configured issuer does not match expected production issuer.
Error increase begins within 2 minutes of deployment 2026.03.16-1.

changes.title: Deploy checkout-api 2026.03.16-1
changes.summary: Rolled out auth configuration refactor for issuer selection.

changes.title: Config change AUTH_ISSUER
changes.summary: Updated issuer environment variable to staging value in production slot.

expectedOutcome.rootCause: Production AUTH_ISSUER points to the staging issuer after the latest deployment.
remediationIncludes: Rollback or correct the AUTH_ISSUER configuration
Validate token issuer in production after config changes
